column8: Goals documented; success metrics defined; governance in place; four tiered personas created.

Acceptance Criteria: draft high-level IA and IA sketch.

Owner: create standard content briefs templates for Tier 1–Tier 4.
Due Date: Brief templates completed; MR/LCL workflows defined; Accessibility baseline documented.

Owner: define medical review and compliance workflows.

Acceptance Criteria: produce Tier 1 patient-facing articles and Tier 2 nurse-facing modules.
Owner: Tier 1 draft articles; Tier 2 module drafts; 2–3 patient videos storyboarded.
draft Tier 3 quick-reference sheets and Tier 4 primer content.
Due Date: Tier 3 sheets; escalation workflow; Tier 4 overview ready.

Owner: finalize tiered navigation; complete WCAG AA pass plan.
Due Date: IA finalized; search/filter strategy; accessibility plan documented.

Acceptance Criteria: prepare pilot with clinics/patients; execute QA plan.
Owner: Pilot plan; consent; feedback survey; QA matrix.
Content freeze; sign-offs; launch playbook ready.

Acceptance Criteria: deploy analytics; publish Tier 1–Tier 3; plan Tier 4 rollout.
Owner: Live site; dashboards configured; Tier 4 modules scheduled.

Acceptance Criteria: monitor usage; fix issues; begin Tier 4 content.
refresh Tier 1 content per guidelines; continue Tier 4.
handover to ops; finalize dashboards; 90-day plan.
